description: Native English, American, with a faint West African cadence (Bambara and French) on the long vowels. Male, early 70s. High-quality, clear. Persona: Retired logistics man. Emotion: dry, courtly, quietly proud. Low, dry baritone, measured and exact, that counts a route off the way a man once briefed a board; the satisfaction rides on top and a quiet loss underneath, the two left unsorted.
text: A thing is here, a thing is wanted there... and somebody has to know the road between. [warm] Ten thousand chains, once, on a wall. Now it's eggs. [laughs] Same shape, you know... [slow] it's exactly the same shape.
